english: Which Indian city has the highest percentage of households with access to safe tap water, according to the National Family Health Survey 2019-21?
hindi: राष्ट्रीय परिवार स्वास्थ्य सर्वेक्षण 2019-21 के अनुसार, कौन सा भारतीय शहर सुरक्षित नल के पानी तक पहुंच वाले घरों की सबसे अधिक प्रतिशतता वाला शहर है?
tamil: 2019-21 ஆம் ஆண்டு நடைபெற்ற தேசிய குடும்ப சுகாதார ஆய்வின்படி, பாதுகாப்பான நீர் வசதி கொண்ட வீடுகளின் அதிக சதவீதம் கொண்ட இந்திய நகரம் எது?
vietnamese: Theo khảo sát Gia đình và Sức khỏe Quốc gia 2019-21, thành phố Ấn Độ nào có tỷ lệ hộ gia đình có tiếp cận nước máy an toàn cao nhất?
correct_answer: According to the National Family Health Survey 2019-21, Delhi has the highest percentage of households with access to safe tap water, with around 93.5% of households having access to improved drinking water sources. However, it is essential to note that the quality of tap water can vary significantly across different cities and regions in India.
